concepts_used.title: 传染病模型 SIR
concepts_used.how_used: 论文使用经典 SIR 模型作为基础，将总人口分为易感、感染、恢复三类，并建立微分方程组描述疾病传播。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: The basic SIR model is a widely accepted model... We have decided to use this model as a basis for a more complex model... Model: N = S(t) + I(t) + R(t); dS/dt = -βSI/N; dI/dt = βSI/N - γI; dR/dt = γI

concepts_used.title: 传染病模型 SIR
concepts_used.how_used: 论文列出了5条假设，包括感染与传染同时发生、人群均匀混合、仅症状者传播、时间尺度内人口不变、免疫后不再易感。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Assumption 1: Time of contraction is considered to be the same as time of infectiousness. Assumption 2: Each individual in the population is equally at risk... Assumption 3: The only carriers of the disease are the ones that show symptoms. Assumption 4: The time scale is small enough that population changes such as deaths, births, and migrations won’t significantly affect the population. Assumption 5: Once someone is immune to the disease they are no longer susceptible to the disease.

concepts_used.title: 灵敏度分析
concepts_used.how_used: 对SIRD模型中的感染率β和死亡率γ_d进行灵敏度分析，通过改变参数值观察对感染人数峰值和总死亡人数的影响。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Sensitivity Analysis: We varied the infection rate β and the death rate γ_d to see how changes affect the peak number of infected and total deaths.

concepts_used.title: 决策树
concepts_used.how_used: 构建决策树模型，根据个体风险（如感染概率、死亡率）和社区风险（如传播速度、医疗资源）的定量阈值将疾病严重程度分为4个风险组，并推荐相应治疗措施。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Our third model is a decision tree that categorizes the severity of the disease based on quantitative thresholds of individual and community risk. The model then recommends treatment measures based on the category said disease falls under.

concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 每个子模型（SIR、SIRD、决策树）均单独列出假设，并给出每条假设的合理性说明。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Assumptions: Assumption 1: Time of contraction is considered to be the same as time of infectiousness. Justification: ...

concepts_used.title: 论文整体结构（IMRaD 格式）
concepts_used.how_used: 论文采用IMRaD结构：摘要、引言（问题重述）、方法（三个模型）、结果（场景应用）、讨论（灵敏度、扩展）、结论。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Table of Contents: Executive Summary, Interpretation/Problem Restatement, Our Models, SIR Model, SIRD Model, Decision Tree Model, Scenario, Conclusion, Potential Extensions, News Report, Appendix, References.

concepts_used.title: 如何从数据中提取结论
concepts_used.how_used: 通过模型互联，用SIRD模型重新运行以评估治疗措施效果，若疾病显著缓解则确认有效性，否则重新分类。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: The interconnectivity between the models means that the effectiveness of the implemented treatment measure can be evaluated by re-running the SIRD model with data from the situation where treatment measures are in effect.
